title: Executive cannot access payroll before run deadline

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] CFO cannot open payroll app before payroll cutoff
servicenow_seed.description: CFO has a payroll-approval deadline in 90 minutes and cannot load the payroll app. Browser shows blank page after sign-in.

correct_steps: Verify caller (executive - high stakes, follow VIP procedure)
Capture exact behavior: blank page vs error vs spinner
Test alternate browser and incognito to rule out client cache
Ask whether other Finance users hit the same screen (check related incidents)
Capture screenshot, timestamp, user ID, deadline, business impact
Escalate to HRIS Application Support immediately - do NOT loop on browser tricks
rationale: VIP + business deadline + production app = P2 escalate, not P3 troubleshoot. Capture evidence and route fast.
hints: Time-bounded business deadlines push priority up regardless of user count.
Two minutes of evidence beats 30 minutes of browser troubleshooting.
learning_objectives: Recognize VIP + deadline as a priority driver
Escalate fast with evidence rather than burning the clock

tool_clues.service_health: HRIS-PAYROLL-PROD: Degraded - 4 related INCs in last 30 minutes.
tool_clues.ad: Caller verified: CFO, on the executive distribution list.
